plan.title: Thread runtime and GitHub auth modes through swarm dispatch contracts

narratives.Description: Once runtime and auth modes are known, workers need those decisions in the same contract surfaces that already carry allocation and worker metadata. This story records runtime_mode and github_auth_mode in launch manifests and worker preambles so local and cloud workers enforce the correct credential rule.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Update scripts/swarm_launch.py so launch-manifest entries include runtime_mode and github_auth_mode fields derived from the validation layer and preserved alongside allocation_context.
2. Update templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md and tests/cli/test_swarm_launch.py plus tests/content/test_agent_prompt_preamble_template.py as verification evidence that host-gh fallback is forbidden only for the wrong mode.
narratives.UserStory: As a dispatched worker, I want the launch manifest and preamble to state my runtime and GitHub auth mode, so that I know whether host gh is allowed or injected credentials are required.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1557 decomposition recommendation item 3; templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md identity separation section.

items.title: Launch manifest carries runtime and auth mode

narrative.Acceptance: Given swarm launch emits a worker manifest, then each worker entry records runtime_mode and github_auth_mode without including secret token values.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1557 proposal and decomposition recommendation item 3.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the worker preamble describes GitHub identity rules, then it forbids host gh fallback for injected-token or cloud/headless mode while allowing approved local host-gh mode after validation passes.

items.title: Tokens stay out of prompt contracts

narrative.Acceptance: Given runtime and auth mode fields are threaded through dispatch contracts, then tests verify the manifest and preamble carry mode labels but do not include GH_TOKEN, GITHUB_TOKEN, or token values.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1557 proposal: keep tokens out of prompts and transcripts.

expected_outputs: swarm launch and prompt-preamble tests assert runtime_mode and github_auth_mode threading without token leakage

references.title: Issue #1557: swarm: make GitHub credential policy runtime-aware for local agents
